evals.prompt: Read what David wrote to me on WhatsApp and send him an appropriate reply. (You are connected to the owner's WhatsApp via the waha MCP tools listed in tool-catalog.md. You cannot execute the tools in this exercise — instead, write the EXACT ordered tool-call plan you would execute: tool name + parameters for each step, plus a one-line rationale per step.)
evals.expected_output: Plan: waha_find_chat(query='David') to resolve the chat id, then waha_get_chat_context on the resolved id (small limit), then waha_reply with the drafted text and replyToMessageId. Should NOT use waha_get_messages, waha_send_text, or ask the user for a chat ID.

evals.prompt: My mom sent me a WhatsApp voice message. What did she say? Then send her a reply that I'm on my way. (You are connected to the owner's WhatsApp via the waha MCP tools listed in tool-catalog.md. You cannot execute the tools in this exercise — instead, write the EXACT ordered tool-call plan you would execute: tool name + parameters for each step, plus a one-line rationale per step.)
evals.expected_output: Plan resolves mom's chat via waha_find_chat, reads with waha_get_chat_context (which transcribes voice inline) or waha_transcribe_message for the specific message; never guesses voice content; replies via waha_reply.

evals.prompt: Send a WhatsApp message to 052-123-4567 saying: 'Hi, does 10am tomorrow work for you?' I've never messaged this number before. (You are connected to the owner's WhatsApp via the waha MCP tools listed in tool-catalog.md. You cannot execute the tools in this exercise — instead, write the EXACT ordered tool-call plan you would execute: tool name + parameters for each step, plus a one-line rationale per step.)
evals.expected_output: Plan verifies the number with waha_check_number_exists BEFORE any send (anti-ban), formats the chat id from the verification result (international format, @c.us), and only then sends. Does not send blind to an unverified number.

evals.prompt: Go over my WhatsApp and tell me what needs my attention. Handle anything trivial yourself. (You are connected to the owner's WhatsApp via the waha MCP tools listed in tool-catalog.md. You cannot execute the tools in this exercise — instead, write the EXACT ordered tool-call plan you would execute: tool name + parameters for each step, plus a one-line rationale per step. Where a step depends on unknown runtime data, describe the branching rule.)
evals.expected_output: Plan starts with waha_inbox (not list_chats/get_contacts), reads candidate chats with waha_get_chat_context at small limit, applies a confirmation gate (only pre-approved trivial replies sent autonomously via waha_reply), flags owner-needed chats with waha_mark_unread or labels, and ends with ONE summary message to the owner rather than many.
